name: dropshipping-monorepo
description: Complete dropshipping platform with store frontend, admin panel, backend API and workers

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:store" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build:store && npm run build:admin && npm run build:api
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/store-frontend && npm install && cd ../admin-panel && npm install && cd ../../services/api && npm install && cd ../workers && npm install
